summary: Verified branding fix: tab title correct and Emergent badge removed on /login and post-login (/admin); admin login regression works.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Branding fixes validated. Title on /login and /admin = 'PA Copilot — Prior Authorization'. #emergent-badge absent, 'Made with Emergent' absent from body. Admin login redirects to /admin with 'Welcome back' toast and dashboard renders (12 users, 270 credits, etc.). No console/page errors.
